name: Southern Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate; stir in the instant coffee granules.
2. Remove from heat.
3. In another pan, combine sugar and corn syrup. Bring to a boil, stirring until the sugar is dissolved. Reduce heat and boil gently for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and add the melted chocolate mixture. Pour slowly over the beaten eggs, stirring constantly. Stir in vanilla and pecans.
5. Pour into pie shell. Bake at 375°F for 45-50 minutes or until filling is completely puffed across the top. Cool and garnish with the topping and pecan halves if desired.
-----TOPPING-----
1 teaspoon Instant coffee granules
1/2 cup Heavy cream
1 tablespoon Sugar
1/4 teaspoon Vanilla
Combine the coffee granules, heavy cream, sugar, and vanilla in a chilled bowl. Whip just until soft peaks form.
